@graph.name: Custom Business Website Development
@graph.description: Custom business websites that establish credibility, drive leads, and represent brands with premium design and engineering. Includes UI/UX design, responsive development, SEO optimization, and 1 Year Support.

@graph.name: E-commerce Website Development
@graph.description: Scalable online stores with product management, secure checkout, payment integration (Razorpay/Stripe), inventory tracking, and order management. Built with Next.js and TypeScript.

@graph.name: Custom Web Application Development
@graph.description: Tailored web applications with full-stack development, database design, RESTful and GraphQL APIs, user authentication, real-time features, and cloud deployment.

@graph.name: SaaS Platform Development
@graph.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platforms with subscription billing (Stripe), user management, analytics dashboards, RESTful API development, and scalable cloud infrastructure.

@graph.name: UI/UX Design Services
@graph.description: User-centered design combining aesthetics with usability. Includes user research, wireframing, prototyping, visual design, design systems, and developer handoff.

@graph.name: Website Redesign Services
@graph.description: Full transformation of existing websites into modern, high-performance digital experiences. Includes audit, modern UI refresh, performance optimization, and SEO improvements.

@graph.name: SEO Optimization Services
@graph.description: Technical and on-page SEO to improve search rankings and drive organic traffic. Includes SEO audit, keyword research, meta tags, structured data, and Google Search Console setup.

@graph.name: Website Performance Optimization
@graph.description: Speed optimization to achieve Lighthouse 95+ scores and improve Core Web Vitals. Includes audit, image optimization, code splitting, caching, and CDN configuration.

@graph.name: AI Integration Services
@graph.description: AI-powered features including chatbots, content generation, smart search, personalization, and custom AI model integration for web applications.

@graph.name: Next.js Development
@graph.description: Professional Next.js development services for building fast, SEO-optimized, and scalable web applications with server-side rendering and static generation.

@graph.name: React Development
@graph.description: Custom React development services for building interactive user interfaces and single-page applications with modern JavaScript and TypeScript.

@graph.name: Tailwind CSS Development
@graph.description: Professional Tailwind CSS development for building responsive, utility-first UI with custom design systems and optimized production builds.

@graph.name: Landing Page Design and Development
@graph.description: High-converting landing pages designed and developed for campaigns, product launches, and lead generation with optimized performance.

@graph.name: Portfolio Website Development
@graph.description: Premium portfolio websites for creators, freelancers, and agencies showcasing work with elegant design and smooth interactions.

@graph.name: Website Maintenance
@graph.description: Ongoing website maintenance including updates, security patches, performance monitoring, content updates, and technical support.
